title: Transforming Healthcare Operations
summary: Philips Healthcare used Action Learning to resolve collaboration challenges while embedding a decentralized operating model and protecting patient safety.
plainLanguageSummary: This case shows how Action Learning helps healthcare teams solve cross-functional operating problems while keeping patient safety central.
keyFindings: Action Learning can improve collaboration during operating-model change.
Role clarity and patient safety can be addressed together rather than separately.
Healthcare teams respond well to a question-first facilitation method.
promoSeed: New case study: how Philips used Action Learning to support collaboration and patient safety during operating-model change.

title: Reviving Unity and Rebuilding Trust
summary: The Red Cross chapter in Peru used Action Learning to repair relationships, rebuild trust, and re-center leadership around shared mission outcomes.
plainLanguageSummary: Action Learning can help teams recover from internal conflict by creating space for disciplined questions and shared accountability.
keyFindings: Trust repair needs facilitated reflection, not just new policies.
Conflict and mission drift can be addressed in the same Action Learning cycle.
Leadership teams benefit from visible commitment to listening.
promoSeed: What happens when an organization is fractured internally? This WIAL case study shows how Action Learning can rebuild trust.

title: Why Action Learning Works for Team Performance
summary: A practical webinar focused on how Action Learning improves decision quality, team learning, and leadership capability in live organizational contexts.
plainLanguageSummary: This webinar explains Action Learning in practical terms and ties the method to measurable team performance gains.
keyFindings: Action Learning creates disciplined reflection inside real work.
It develops leaders while solving urgent organizational problems.
The method is especially effective for cross-functional teams.
promoSeed: Need a fast introduction to Action Learning for decision-makers? This webinar breaks down the business value in plain language.

title: Innovation in Financial Services
summary: FirstBank of Nigeria used Action Learning in its corporate academy to sustain innovation across a large, distributed branch network.
plainLanguageSummary: The case demonstrates how Action Learning can support innovation in large financial institutions with many branches and complex coordination needs.
keyFindings: Large financial organizations can use Action Learning at branch-network scale.
Corporate academies can become real operating levers, not just training centers.
Innovation efforts improve when teams work on live problems.
promoSeed: How do large banks keep innovation practical across hundreds of branches? This WIAL case offers a compelling answer.
